composite.name: Brand Button
composite.description: BrandButton - Extended button component with brand variants Enhanced button component extending the base Button with glass-morphism and floating action variants while preserving all original Button variants.

composite.name: Floating Action
composite.description: FloatingAction - Floating action button primitive A fixed-position floating action button with multiple variants and positions. Captures the 8+ floating button instances across the codebase.

composite.name: Glass Card
composite.description: GlassCard - Reusable glass-morphism card component A flexible card component with glass-morphism effects and multiple variants. Captures the 23+ glass-morphism pattern instances across the codebase.

composite.name: Interactive Card
composite.description: InteractiveCard - Interactive card component with hover/click states A flexible card component with predefined interactive behaviors. Captures the 20+ interactive card pattern instances across the codebase.

composite.name: Nav Header
composite.description: NavHeader - Navigation header primitive A flexible navigation header component with glass-morphism and floating variants. Captures the 12+ navigation header instances across the codebase.

composite.name: Overview Content
composite.description: Generic Overview Content Component Consolidated replacement for BusinessOverviewContent and IdeasOverviewContent Renders a hero section followed by section cards with navigation

composite.name: Pitch Deck Content Renderer
composite.description: Renders paragraph and highlight content for pitch deck sections Handles both simple strings and complex content objects

composite.name: Pitch Deck Hero
composite.description: Hero section component for pitch deck presentations Displays avatar, title, subtitle, stats, and optional custom content

composite.name: Pitch Deck Section Card
composite.description: Reusable section card component for pitch deck presentations Provides consistent glass-morphism styling and navigation

composite.name: Status Badge
composite.description: StatusBadge - Semantic role and status badges A flexible badge component for displaying user roles and status states. Captures the 36+ color-coded badge pattern instances across the codebase.

layout.name: View Container
layout.description: ViewContainer - Layout preset consumer component Applies a view preset configuration to a page, handling responsive behavior, spacing, quality settings, and mobile optimizations automatically.

model.name: Book Model
model.description: Book Model Component Displays book model for documentation/contract sections

model.name: Building Model
model.description: Building Model Component Displays building 3D model with native caching and disposal Memoized to prevent unnecessary re-renders

model.name: Future Island Model
model.description: Future Island Model Component Displays futuristic island model

model.name: U A V Model
model.description: UAV Model Component Displays UAV drone model with proper caching and disposal

hook.name: use Mobile Detection
hook.description: Hook to detect mobile screen size

hook.name: use Model Stats
hook.description: Hook for attaching stat displays to 3D models Handles positioning, visibility, and LOD (level of detail) for loader components attached to 3D models in a scene.

hook.name: use Responsive Offset
hook.description: Hook to detect screen size and calculate responsive offsets Returns offset values for positioning model and content On large screens: models positioned at right edge (justify-end equivalent)

hook.name: use Role Based Navigation
hook.description: Filter navigation items based on user's access level Removes items the user doesn't have permission to see

hook.name: use Scroll Navigation
hook.description: Hook for scroll-based navigation between sections

hook.name: use Scroll Section
hook.description: Hook to track which section is currently in view based on scroll position Optimized with requestAnimationFrame for better performance

primitive.name: Camera Viewfinder
primitive.description: CameraViewfinder - Minimal camera overlay wrapper Wraps any component in a camera viewfinder UI with metadata display. Useful for showcasing 3D models, product views, or any focal content.

dashboard.name: Dashboard Card
dashboard.description: Dashboard Card Component Card container for dashboard content with optional icon and status indicators. Supports different variants for various data display purposes.

dashboard.name: Dashboard Layout
dashboard.description: Dashboard Layout Component Main container for dashboard layouts with grid support and responsive design. Combines a main content area with optional sidebar for controls.

dashboard.name: Data Grid
dashboard.description: Data Grid Component Responsive table for displaying structured data with sorting and filtering support. Designed for dashboard use with clean styling.

editor.name: Property Input
editor.description: Property Input Component Labeled input for editing a single property value. Supports various input types with validation and formatting.

editor.name: Property Panel
editor.description: Property Panel Component Container for editing object properties with organized sections. Supports collapsible groups and various input types.

editor.name: Vector Input
editor.description: Vector Input Component Input for 3D vectors (x, y, z) with synchronized controls. Useful for positions, scales, and rotations.

3d-dashboard.name: Model Dashboard
3d-dashboard.description: Model Dashboard Component Complete dashboard for 3D model viewing and manipulation. Combines 3D viewport with property editor and statistics.

3d-dashboard.name: Scene Control Panel
3d-dashboard.description: Scene Control Panel Component Control panel for managing 3D scene properties including lighting, camera, environment, and effects.
